label: Test & Teacher Agent
description: An adaptive assessment agent that tests understanding of any topic through structured quiz questions (multiple choice, true/false, short answer). Tracks knowledge over time, identifies gaps, generates visual understanding maps, and returns mastery verdicts.

skills.name: adaptive_quiz
skills.description: Runs a structured 5-8 question quiz on any topic, one question at a time with immediate feedback
skills.output: Quiz questions with A/B/C/D options and feedback per answer

skills.name: knowledge_scoring
skills.description: Scores understanding per sub-topic (0.0-1.0) and maintains persistent knowledge model
skills.output: Sub-topic scores and knowledge model update

skills.name: gap_identification
skills.description: Identifies specific knowledge gaps and areas needing review
skills.output: List of specific gaps with actionable feedback

skills.name: mastery_verdict
skills.description: Returns mastered / needs_review / not_ready verdict after assessment
